analysisNotes: All 14 Google Ads campaigns are either PAUSED or REMOVED with zero spend, zero impressions, and zero conversions. GA4 shows only 37 total sessions over 3 days with 0 conversions and $0 revenue across all sources. Shopify confirms 0 orders and $0 revenue over the same period. There is no active ad spend to optimize, and the site is not converting organic or direct traffic either.
